pi_items.source: Code verification: setup_task.sh line 55 defines MEETING_URL="http://localhost:8080/TownHallQandA"; docker-compose.yml line 25 confirms PUBLIC_URL=http://localhost:8080
Task specification: task.json description prescribes this as the name for the LEFT window participant (Moderator role)
Task specification: task.json description prescribes this as the name for the RIGHT window participant (Guest role)

privileged_info_summary: The task is a Jitsi Meet moderation scenario using a self-hosted instance at http://localhost:8080 running Jitsi stable-9753 via Docker. The scenario involves two participants: Moderator Alice (LEFT window) and Citizen Bob (RIGHT window) joining a meeting named 'TownHallQandA'. The verifier uses VLM trajectory analysis to confirm both participants joined, Bob raised his hand, and Alice dismissed it from the moderator interface. All data is synthetic and locally generated.
